## What does this PR do?

<!-- New agent? Fix? Tooling/docs change? One sentence. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes with **0 errors**
- [ ] `npm run build` was run and the generated files are committed
- [ ] New/edited agents follow the [authoring guide](../docs/authoring-guide.md)
- [ ] `description` includes trigger phrasing + at least one `<example>`
- [ ] Correct [model tier](../docs/model-tiering.md) and scoped `tools`
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing agent (checked `AGENTS.md`)
